subcodes.first_line: O ye two steadfast believers assured in faith! Praise be to God that the flame of the light of guidance hath illumined the Sinai of your hearts and souls [3.5s]... ...God’s wisdom hath decreed that partners to a marriage should be of distant origins
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو مومن موقن ثابت حمد خدا را که از شعله نور هدی سینای دل و جان روشن شد
subcodes.subjects: @law of inheritance, @law of divorce, @laws of marriage and dowry, @praise and encouragement, @unchastity and adultery
